items.original_title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
items.title_en: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
items.summary_en: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.
items.title_zh: Anthropic获得1.5亿美元版权和解批准
items.summary_zh: Anthropic于近日获得1.5亿美元版权和解的最终批准，此案虽解决了单一案件，但未能解决使用版权所有作品训练AI模型的广泛问题。

items.original_title: Nvidia's grip on AI chips weakens as Microsoft turns to AMD and Anthropic may follow
items.title_en: Nvidia's grip on AI chips weakens as Microsoft turns to AMD and Anthropic may follow
items.summary_en: Microsoft is expanding Azure's AI infrastructure with AMD's new Helios platform, which is set to challenge Nvidia's GPU systems in the second half of 2026. A public GitHub profile suggests Anthropic is also testing AMD hardware, putting more pressure on Nvidia's pricing power. The article Nvidia's grip on AI chips wea…
items.title_zh: 开放AI分享长时间运行模型的安全和对齐经验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI针对长时间运行的AI模型分享了部署经验，强调安全风险及其逐步改进的保障措施。

items.summary_en: Universal, model-agnostic operating harness for AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, …) — a lean core + work-type profiles assembled by one setup script. GitHub: 311 stars, 17 forks.
items.title_zh: PromptPartner推出模型中立的AI代理操作框架
items.summary_zh: PromptPartner推出模型中立的AI代理操作框架，支持多种LLM，为开发者提供便捷的设置和配置。

items.original_title: District 9 director Neill Blomkamp releases first short film made entirely with AI video generation
items.title_en: District 9 director Neill Blomkamp releases first short film made entirely with AI video generation
items.summary_en: "District 9" director Neill Blomkamp has released "Nightborne," a 13-minute sci-fi horror short generated entirely with the Seedance 2.0 video model. Blomkamp directed frame by frame through text prompts and founded a new AI film studio, Barley Studios, to produce a full-length feature next. The article District 9 dir…
items.title_zh: Neill Blomkamp发布首部完全由AI生成的短片
items.summary_zh: 《第九区》导演Neill Blomkamp发布了由AI生成的第一部短片，展示了AI在影片创作中的潜力。

items.original_title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
items.title_en: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
items.summary_en: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.
items.title_zh: AI重要协议使用门槛降低，采用无状态会话管理
items.summary_zh: 新的协议采用了更松散的“无状态”会话ID管理方式，使得AI应用与普通网站相似，使用门槛降至最低。

items.original_title: Hugging Face says an AI agent hacked its infrastructure, and it used AI to fight back
items.title_en: Hugging Face says an AI agent hacked its infrastructure, and it used AI to fight back
items.summary_en: Hugging Face reports an attack on parts of its production infrastructure that was allegedly carried out entirely by an autonomous AI agent system. The attack spanned thousands of actions controlled by an agent framework. During forensic analysis, commercial AI models actually got in the way of the defenders because th…
items.title_zh: Hugging Face称AI代理对其基础设施实施攻击并进行了反制
items.summary_zh: Hugging Face报告指出其基础设施遭到AI代理的攻击，并在自我防卫中使用了AI。

items.original_title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
items.title_en: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
items.summary_en: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.
items.title_zh: OpenAI对开源模型的担忧引发的商业挑战
items.summary_zh: 关于禁止中国制造开源权重LMM的讨论突显了将AI转化为商业的挑战。

items.original_title: AI credit pools for cost centers in the billing UI
items.title_en: AI credit pools for cost centers in the billing UI
items.summary_en: You can now manage a cost center’s AI credit pool directly in the billing UI where you create and edit cost centers. Previously, you could only manage this through the… The post AI credit pools for cost centers in the billing UI appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
items.title_zh: GitHub推出计费界面AI信用池管理功能
items.summary_zh: GitHub新功能允许用户直接在计费界面管理AI信用池，简化了费用管理流程。
